hero.title: 2026 Player Calendar Photo Effect
hero.subtitle: Turn one portrait into a stylish 2026 player calendar visual with this PixVerse template. Upload a photo and get a polished, share-ready result in seconds.

features.title: Template-driven calendar design
features.description: Apply the 2026 Player Calendar PixVerse template to your image with one click.

features.title: One photo, instant output
features.description: Upload a single image and let the template generate the full calendar-style composition.

media.alt: Single photo input for calendar effect

features.title: Ready for posting or printing
features.description: Get a clean, high-quality output suitable for social sharing, posters, or event promos.

steps.title: 1. Upload a portrait
steps.description: Choose a clear player photo from your device.

steps.title: 2. Run the template
steps.description: Click generate to apply the 2026 Player Calendar effect.

steps.title: 3. Save and share
steps.description: Download your result and share it with your team or community.

items.question: What is 2026 Player Calendar?
items.answer: It is a PixVerse image template that transforms one portrait into a 2026 player calendar themed design.

items.question: How many credits does it cost?
items.answer: Each 2026 Player Calendar generation costs 30 credits.

items.question: Can I use the result commercially?
items.answer: Yes, results can be used for personal and commercial purposes.
